notes: Scaffolds .ship/ directory in project or ~/.ship/ globally with --global flag
Activates an agent by ID, compiles immediately, supports --with for injecting extra skills
Compiles active agent to provider-native configs with --provider filter and --dry-run preview
Shows the active agent and compilation status for the current or specified directory
Validates .ship/ config — checks TOML, skill refs, MCP fields, permissions with JSON output option
Login/logout/whoami commands for authenticating with getship.dev
Read/write user preferences in ~/.ship/config.toml via get, set, list, path subcommands
Built-in help system with topic-based documentation via ship docs <topic>
